steps.name: Regression test: skip state lost on reload
steps.criteria: Test creates trip, skips an item, simulates reload via loadFromStorage, asserts skipped item still has needed=false

steps.name: Add persistTrip to skipItem and unskipItem
steps.criteria: skipItem and unskipItem call persistTrip after mutation; regression test passes; all existing tests pass

steps.name: Regression test: completed areas lost on reload
steps.criteria: Test creates trip, completes an area, simulates reload, asserts getSweepProgress shows area still completed

steps.name: Add completedAreas to Trip type and persistence
steps.criteria: completedAreas added to Trip type; buildTrip includes completedAreas; loadFromStorage restores completedAreas; completeArea calls persistTrip; regression test passes

steps.name: Regression test: skipped row shows no item name
steps.criteria: Test renders AreaSection with skipped items, asserts item name text is visible alongside Re-add button
steps.scenario_name: skipped item row displays item name

steps.name: Add item name to skipped row in AreaSection
steps.criteria: Skipped items render item.name text with strikethrough style alongside Re-add button; skippedRow uses flexDirection row; regression test passes
steps.scenario_name: skipped item row displays item name
